title: Senior Business Consultant (m/f/d) Markets & Innovation
required_skills: Top Master's degree from a leading university or business school
Experience in Tier-1 management consulting (internships or 2-3 years)
Strong analytical skills, structured thinking, and execution focus
Experience in at least one of: Commercial Strategy & GTM, Innovation & new business models (AI, platforms), Sales or Product strategy
Confident presence at top management level
matched_skills: Analytical skills and structured reporting: executive-level data storytelling at HSBC, Hapag-Lloyd sprint reports
GTM strategy experience: 4 product launches at IPC (IoT), 6 product lines at GRG Banking — partial Commercial Strategy hit
Master's degree: Leuphana University Master of Management & Entrepreneurship (not a top-tier school but relevant degree)
Cross-functional stakeholder management at senior level: HSBC C-suite interface
missing_skills: Tier-1 management consulting experience (McKinsey, BCG, Bain, etc.) — no consulting firm background
Top-tier university/business school degree (Leuphana is not recognised as a leading business school in this context)
C1 German (candidate is B1 — hard requirement gap)
Commercial strategy at a consulting or inhouse consulting firm
Innovation or AI/platform business model expertise
Confident presence at top management level as a consultant (not as a PMO coordinator)
core_responsibilities: Work on central strategic questions of Deutsche Telekom
Develop executable strategies (GTM, pricing, business models)
Translate analyses, interviews, and workshops into clear decisions
Present to senior stakeholders and top management
Contribute to development of team, topics, and initiatives
recommended_emphasis: This role is a poor match — application is not recommended
Tier-1 consulting background is effectively a prerequisite that the candidate lacks
C1 German is a hard requirement; B1 is disqualifying for a top-management consulting role
The inhouse consulting positioning (Telekom Strategy Consulting) means the bench is stacked with McKinsey/BCG alumni
summary: Match score 20.8% — poor match. This inhouse management consulting role at Deutsche Telekom's strategy arm requires Tier-1 consulting background (or equivalent prestigious internships), top-tier university credentials, and C1 German — all of which the candidate lacks. While GTM and analytical skills provide marginal overlap, the competitive bar for this elite inhouse consulting unit makes the candidate's PMO background insufficient. Application is not recommended.
